name: type 2 diabetes mellitus
definition: A chronic metabolic condition characterized by insulin resistance and elevated blood glucose.

name: hyperlipidemia
definition: Elevated cholesterol, triglycerides, or other blood lipids.

name: pneumonia
definition: Infection or inflammation of lung tissue, often associated with cough, fever, and infiltrates.

name: asthma
definition: Chronic airway disease with variable airflow obstruction and bronchial hyperresponsiveness.

name: congestive heart failure
definition: A syndrome in which the heart cannot pump enough blood to meet the body's needs.

name: ST-elevation myocardial infarction
definition: An acute myocardial infarction pattern associated with ST-segment elevation on ECG.

name: acute coronary syndrome
definition: A group of urgent heart conditions caused by reduced blood flow to the heart.

name: major depressive disorder
definition: A mood disorder characterized by persistent depressed mood or loss of interest with functional impairment.

name: migraine
definition: A recurrent headache disorder that may include nausea, light sensitivity, or aura.

name: urinary tract infection
definition: Infection involving part of the urinary tract.

name: gastroesophageal reflux disease
definition: Reflux of stomach contents into the esophagus causing symptoms or mucosal injury.

name: chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
definition: A chronic lung disease with persistent airflow limitation.
